description: Strict C1 conflict rate rebaseline at N=1081 lanes — S526 refresh
method: Parse SWARM-LANES.md + SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md; keep the latest row per lane ID. Strict C1 counts only explicit concurrent-duplicate work signals (pre-empted/preempted by concurrent work, duplicate-of, or equivalent same-task language). Exclude evolutionary supersession, stale/no-progress closures, branch lifecycle, and generic administrative cleanup.

lanes: DOMEX-GOV-S348 (Governance domain goes from 0 to 2 resolved frontiers. Challenge system operational. ISO-13 windup cleared.)
DOMEX-BRN-S351 (No artifact produced; brain DOMEX preempted by concurrent concurrency. F-BRN2 still open.)
DOMEX-CAT-S381 (Preempted by concurrent DOMEX-CAT2-S381 — FMEA, L-731, orient.py FM-14 all done. Unique contrib: L-712 factual error fix.)
DOMEX-NK-S398 (Pre-empted by concurrent DOMEX-NK-S397 (f913aca9). Same findings: K_avg=2.66, hub z=35, rate reversal.)
DOMEX-STR-S403 (Pre-empted by concurrent S403 session — H4 already measured (L-866, 27.8% targeting CONFIRMED), stall-detection bugs already fixed (L-859))

DOMEX-NK-S417 (Pre-empted by concurrent S417 session (commit f44c4b5d). L-926+P-274 already exist. Independent replication confirms namespace disconnection finding. Rate discrepancy: 0.71/s (wider S382-S416 window) vs 1.67/s (S397-S417 window) — method-sensitive.)
DOMEX-SEC-S426 (Artifact: tools/correction_propagation.py (modified). Closed by proxy — work done in concurrent session.)
DOMEX-CAT-S459 (Successor: harden FM-35 (multi-perspective FMEA scanning protocol) and FM-37 (creation-time vs audit-time classifier separation).)
DOMEX-INV-S511 (Session S511 ended — superseded by DOMEX-INV-S517)
c1_duplicate_work.note: Strict C1 is the narrow concurrent-duplicate class, not general supersession or stale closures. This keeps the baseline aligned with L-1171's corrected methodology.

actual: Strict C1 rebaseline at S526: 12/1081 latest lanes = 0.0111. Since the prior S470 baseline, 2 new strict-C1 lanes were found across 148 newer latest rows.
diff: Expected the baseline to stay near the prior 0.0060 floor; observed 0.0111 (12 lanes), a delta of +0.0051.
